title: LS_109_HAM_2h +Mtb
treatment_protocol_ch1: HAMs were infected with H37Rv Mtb (MOI 1:1) for 2hrs and unbound Mtb washed away with RPMI-HEPES. Cells were then maintanained in RMPI supplemented with 2mM glutamine and 20% human AB serum (Celtic Molecular Diagnostics).
growth_protocol_ch1: Human alveolar macrophges (HAMs) were isolated from bronchoalveolar lavage fluid, and plated in 96-well Falcon tissue culture plates in 20% autologous plasma in humidified atmosphere with 5% CO2 at 37C  for 2hrs to allow HAMs to adhere. Non-adhering cells were removed by washing with RMPI-HEPES (Sigma).
extract_protocol_ch1: Cells were retrieved from plates using 5mM EDTA (Sigma) and incubating the cells on ice for 30mins. Cells were stored in RNALater (Invitrogen) at -80C. Prior to shipment the cells were spun down and RNALater replaced with Trizol. RNA was isolated using Quick-RNA Microprep Kit (R1050; Zymo Research) as per the manufacturer’s instructions. Isolated RNA was quantified using the Qubit RNA High Sensitivity Assay Kit (Q32852) and Qubit 4 Fluorometer (both from ThermoFisher Scientific).
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA sequencing libraries were prepared from 25-500ng of Total RNA using the NEB Next directional RNA library preparation Kit with poly (A) enrichment module (Ipswich, MA).
data_processing.1: Low-quality sequences and adapters were trimmed.
data_processing.2: Trimmed reads were mapped to the human hg38 reference genome.
data_processing.3: The reads were assigned to the transcripts using the EM algorithm.
data_processing.4: The TMM normalization  in EdgeR and multi-factorial statistics based on a negative binomial Generalized Linear Model (GLM) were carried out for differential expression analysis.
data_processing.6: Supplementary files format and content: Ch2+vsCh2-RawCounts.xlsx
data_processing.7: Supplementary files format and content: Ch72+VsCh72-RawCounts.xlsx
data_processing.8: Supplementary files format and content: Ch24+VsCh24-RawCounts.xlsx

title: LS_145_HAM_72h +Mtb
treatment_protocol_ch1: HAMs were infected with H37Rv Mtb (MOI 1:1) for 2hrs and unbound Mtb washed away with RPMI-HEPES. Cells were then maintanained in RMPI supplemented with 2mM glutamine and 20% human AB serum (Celtic Molecular Diagnostics).
growth_protocol_ch1: Human alveolar macrophges (HAMs) were isolated from bronchoalveolar lavage fluid, and plated in 96-well Falcon tissue culture plates in 20% autologous plasma in humidified atmosphere with 5% CO2 at 37C  for 2hrs to allow HAMs to adhere. Non-adhering cells were removed by washing with RMPI-HEPES (Sigma).
extract_protocol_ch1: Cells were retrieved from plates using 5mM EDTA (Sigma) and incubating the cells on ice for 30mins. Cells were stored in RNALater (Invitrogen) at -80C. Prior to shipment the cells were spun down and RNALater replaced with Trizol. RNA was isolated using Quick-RNA Microprep Kit (R1050; Zymo Research) as per the manufacturer’s instructions. Isolated RNA was quantified using the Qubit RNA High Sensitivity Assay Kit (Q32852) and Qubit 4 Fluorometer (both from ThermoFisher Scientific).
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA sequencing libraries were prepared from 25-500ng of Total RNA using the NEB Next directional RNA library preparation Kit with poly (A) enrichment module (Ipswich, MA).
data_processing.1: Low-quality sequences and adapters were trimmed.
data_processing.2: Trimmed reads were mapped to the human hg38 reference genome.
data_processing.3: The reads were assigned to the transcripts using the EM algorithm.
data_processing.4: The TMM normalization  in EdgeR and multi-factorial statistics based on a negative binomial Generalized Linear Model (GLM) were carried out for differential expression analysis.
data_processing.6: Supplementary files format and content: Ch2+vsCh2-RawCounts.xlsx

data_processing.4: The TMM normalization  in EdgeR and multi-factorial statistics based on a negative binomial Generalized Linear Model (GLM) were carried out for differential expression analysis.
data_processing.6: Supplementary files format and content: Ch2+vsCh2-RawCounts.xlsx
data_processing.7: Supplementary files format and content: Ch72+VsCh72-RawCounts.xlsx
data_processing.8: Supplementary files format and content: Ch24+VsCh24-RawCounts.xlsx
